title: GitHub Actions Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on GitHub automation and CI/CD tools.

questions.question: Regarding GitHub, what are 'GitHub Actions' used for?
options: To collect and analyze data from the database
To build, test, and deploy code projects directly on GitHub's servers

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a GitHub-Actions-based workflow?
options: Creating automated workflows that are triggered by specific events in your repository
Recording a commit directly through SQL
Its only possible for SQL repositories

questions.question: Which of these events is a common trigger for a GitHub Action?
